name: Concord — Telegram Poller
notes: SEED REQUIRED before first run: INSERT INTO social_rotation (platform, category, daily_limit) VALUES ('telegram', 'offset_0', 999);

parameters.query: SELECT category AS offset_value FROM social_rotation WHERE platform = 'telegram' AND category LIKE 'offset_%' LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO ingested_content (source_name, source_url, content_hash, raw_title, raw_body, raw_image_url, language, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8) ON CONFLICT (content_hash) DO NOTHING
UPDATE social_rotation SET category = CONCAT('offset_', $1::text), updated_at = NOW() WHERE platform = 'telegram' AND category LIKE 'offset_%';

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { message: 'No new Telegram messages', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
